message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant Workflow\nwith SAML2 Post Binding for user provisioning

participant "HealthCloud" as HC
participant "Embedded Browser" as EB
participant "Apigee Edge" as AE
participant "Orion Health Platform" as OHP

box "HealthSphere" #lightblue
  participant AE
  participant OHP
end box

HC -> EB: 
activate EB
EB -> AE: GET /authorize?response_type=code
activate AE
AE --> EB: 302 https://<redirect_url> (SAML OR token)
deactivate AE

frame "SAML Authentication" {
  EB -> AE: POST /oauth2/saml
  activate AE
  AE -> OHP: POST /login-auth/saml?path=/actor/current
  activate OHP
  OHP -> OHP: Verify SAMLResponse
  OHP --> AE: 
  deactivate OHP
  AE -> AE: Generate authorization code
  AE --> EB: 302 https://<redirect_url>?code=<code>
  deactivate AE
}

EB -> AE: POST /token?code=<code>
activate AE
AE --> HC: 200 access_token + refresh_token
deactivate AE
deactivate EB

@enduml
```
